content.text: {"severity":"high","affected_region":"us-east","primary_cause":"OpenAI upstream rate limiting causing increased retry pressure and degraded customer traffic throughput","recommended_action":"Immediately shift us-east customer traffic from OpenAI upstream to the healthy Anthropic upstream, implement backoff strategies to reduce retry pressure, and monitor OpenAI rate limit recovery before rebalancing","signals":["Customer traffic slow in us-east","OpenAI upstream is rate limited","Anthropic upstream is healthy","Retry pressure is rising"]}
